user.description: Set up UniFi Insights integration. You need an API key from your UniFi Controller.

error.no_devices_found: No UniFi devices found. Please ensure your UniFi Network or Protect applications have devices configured.

api_key_invalid.title: UniFi Insights API Key Invalid
api_key_invalid.description: The API key for UniFi Insights integration on host {host} is invalid or has expired. Error: {error}. Please update your API key to restore functionality.

host_unreachable.title: UniFi Host Unreachable
host_unreachable.description: The UniFi host {host} is unreachable. Error: {error}. Please check your network connection and host configuration.

no_devices_found.title: No UniFi Devices Found
no_devices_found.description: No UniFi devices were found on host {host}. Please ensure your UniFi Network or Protect applications have devices configured and are accessible.

network_api_failed.title: UniFi Network API Failed
network_api_failed.description: The UniFi Network API on host {host} is not responding properly. Error: {error}. Network devices may not be available.

protect_api_failed.title: UniFi Protect API Failed
protect_api_failed.description: The UniFi Protect API on host {host} is not responding properly. Error: {error}. Protect devices may not be available.

websocket_connection_failed.title: WebSocket Connection Failed
websocket_connection_failed.description: The WebSocket connection to UniFi Protect on host {host} failed. Error: {error}. Real-time updates may not work properly.

firmware_outdated.title: Device Firmware Outdated
firmware_outdated.description: Device {device_name} is running firmware version {current_version}. Consider updating to {recommended_version} for optimal performance and security.

refresh_data.name: Refresh Data
refresh_data.description: Force an immediate refresh of UniFi Insights data.

site_id.name: Site ID
site_id.description: Optional site ID to refresh. If not specified, refreshes all sites.

site_id.name: Site ID
site_id.description: The site ID where the device is located.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The ID of the device to restart.
